case_title: Laurons II · full appendage resistance run v9

metrics.label: Total resistance (t ≥ 20 s)
metrics.source: OpenFOAM force time series, temporal mean and standard deviation

metrics.label: Period mean (15–25.5 s)
metrics.source: OpenFOAM force time series, fixed physical-time window

metrics.label: Towing-test reference
metrics.source: Provided aggregate SVA reference; no third-party report is redistributed

metrics.label: Period mean vs. reference
metrics.source: Deterministic calculation from metric.period_mean and metric.reference_resistance

artifacts.rights: External link only; no third-party image is redistributed

claims: The v9 case contains the hull, keel and two rudders.
The period-mean resistance is below the provided towing-test reference.
Friction and pressure are of comparable magnitude in the selected averaging window.
limits: A three-grid convergence study has not yet been completed.
The force signal remains unsteady; a single snapshot is not a valid resistance estimate.
The sanitized public package does not contain residual histories, boundary-condition details or the exact solver build.
The AI review interprets supplied evidence and does not run or replace the CFD solver.

provenance.geometry: project-created Laurons II CAD; hull + keel + two rudders
provenance.publication_scope: aggregated values and project-generated media only

references.title: Errors and uncertainty in CFD modelling
references.citation: H. K. Versteeg and W. Malalasekera, An Introduction to Computational Fluid Dynamics: The Finite Volume Method, 2nd ed., Pearson, 2007, Chapter 10, pp. 285–303 (PDF pp. 299–317).
references.scope: Numerical error, verification and validation, systematic mesh refinement, GCI, best practice and reporting.

references.title: Uncertainty Analysis in CFD — Verification and Validation Methodology and Procedures
references.citation: ITTC Recommended Procedures and Guidelines 7.5-03-01-01, Revision 03, 2017.
references.scope: Convergence studies, refinement-ratio control and uncertainty reporting.
